draft:
Dear Officer:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Arjun Patel, an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of sustainability commercialization. I have had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Patel and have witnessed firsthand his remarkable skills, achievements, and contributions to the field.

By way of background, I am a seasoned executive and entrepreneur with over 20 years of experience in operations and finance across various industries. I am the co-founder and CFO of Innovil, a company that provides innovative solutions to combat counterfeit products in emerging markets. I have also served as the CFO of Polaris Insurance Group, a global insurance and reinsurance company, and as the Vice President of Finance at Vesper Healthcare Acquisition Corp.

In addition to my corporate roles, I have been deeply involved in the startup ecosystem as an angel investor and mentor. I am a founding member and managing director of Summit Angels, a venture capital firm that invests in early-stage companies. I have also served as an executive in residence and senior fellow at Columbia University's Columbia Business School, where I have taught courses on social entrepreneurship and provided guidance to aspiring entrepreneurs.

Throughout my career, I have had the opportunity to work with numerous talented individuals in the fields of business and entrepreneurship. However, few have impressed me as much as Mr. Patel. I first became acquainted with Mr. Patel through his participation in the Global Innovation Prize competition, where I served as a judge and mentor. The Global Innovation Prize is a prestigious global competition that challenges university students to develop innovative social enterprises that address pressing global issues. The competition is highly competitive, with over 200,000 participants from more than 120 countries.

In 2018, Mr. Patel and his team, Elevate, emerged as one of the top 15 teams globally, out of over 100,000 participants. This remarkable achievement is a testament to Mr. Patel's extraordinary abilities and his commitment to creating impactful solutions to real-world problems. As a judge and mentor for the Global Innovation Prize competition, I had the opportunity to witness firsthand Mr. Patel's outstanding contributions to the Elevate project.

As a co-founder of Elevate, Mr. Patel played a crucial role in developing and implementing a cold storage and distribution system aimed at reducing food waste and improving food security in India. His innovative approach involved designing solar-powered refrigeration units that could be easily transported and deployed in rural areas, where access to electricity is limited. This solution not only helped preserve perishable produce but also empowered local farmers by providing them with a reliable means to store and transport their goods.

Mr. Patel's technical expertise and problem-solving skills were evident throughout the development of the Elevate project. He meticulously researched and analyzed the specific needs and challenges faced by rural communities in India, ensuring that the solution was both practical and sustainable. His ability to think critically and creatively allowed him to devise a system that was not only effective but also economically viable for the target population.

Moreover, Mr. Patel demonstrated exceptional leadership and teamwork skills in his role as a co-founder. He effectively coordinated with his team members, fostering a collaborative environment that encouraged open communication and the sharing of ideas. His dedication and passion for the project were infectious, motivating his team to work tirelessly towards their shared goal.

As a judge and mentor, I was particularly impressed by Mr. Patel's ability to present and articulate the Elevate project clearly and convincingly. His presentations were well-structured and engaging, effectively conveying the significance and impact of the solution. He skillfully addressed questions and feedback from the judges, demonstrating a deep understanding of the project and its potential for real-world application.

Mr. Patel's performance in the Global Innovation Prize competition was nothing short of outstanding. His innovative thinking, technical expertise, and leadership skills were instrumental in the success of the Elevate project. His ability to develop a practical and sustainable solution to a pressing global issue is a testament to his extraordinary abilities and his commitment to making a positive impact in the world.

Beyond the Global Innovation Prize competition, Mr. Patel has continued to demonstrate his extraordinary abilities and commitment to sustainability commercialization through his professional endeavors. As the co-founder of Novatech, Mr. Patel has been at the forefront of developing innovative solutions that address critical environmental challenges. Novatech focuses on converting agricultural waste into sustainable feedstocks for energy and materials, aiming to create a circular economy that reduces waste and lowers emissions.

In his role at Novatech, Mr. Patel has led the company to secure significant funding and establish key partnerships. He successfully closed a $700,000 pre-seed round, with an additional $500,000 set to close, attracting investors such as the founder of Wired UK. This achievement underscores his ability to effectively communicate the value and potential of Novatech's solutions to high-profile investors.

Mr. Patel has also been instrumental in securing letters of intent from major customers, including the global head of procurement at Trust & Lever. His ability to build and maintain strong relationships with industry leaders speaks to his exceptional communication and negotiation skills. Furthermore, he has established research and development agreements with prominent organizations, such as a leading UK retailer, a large Indian manufacturer, and Fresh Fields Director of Innovation, showcasing his ability to drive collaboration and innovation across different sectors.

Under Mr. Patel's leadership, Novatech has developed a plasma reactor to extract cellulose from waste, achieving 80% lower emissions and 30% lower costs compared to traditional methods. This groundbreaking technology highlights his technical expertise and commitment to creating sustainable solutions that have a tangible impact on the environment. Additionally, his efforts in securing pilot sites in Chile and Panama, with an anticipated $60 million annual revenue when operational, demonstrate his strategic vision and ability to scale innovative solutions.

Mr. Patel's work at Novatech exemplifies his extraordinary abilities in sustainability commercialization. His technical expertise, strategic vision, and leadership skills have been instrumental in driving the company's success and advancing its mission to create a more sustainable future. His ability to secure funding, establish key partnerships, and develop groundbreaking technologies underscores his commitment to making a positive impact on the environment and society.

In conclusion, Mr. Patel's remarkable achievements in the Global Innovation Prize competition and his professional endeavors at Novatech clearly demonstrate his extraordinary abilities in sustainability commercialization. His innovative thinking, technical expertise, and leadership skills have been instrumental in developing and implementing solutions that address critical environmental challenges. Mr. Patel's dedication to making a positive impact on the world is truly commendable, and I have no doubt that he will continue to contribute significantly to the field of sustainability commercialization. I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Patel and am confident that he will be an invaluable asset in any endeavor he pursues.

Yours truly, 

Jasper NolanCo-Founder and CFOInnovil, Inc. jasper@innovil.com
final:
Dear Officer:
 
I write this letter to serve as my wholehearted recommendation of Mr. Arjun Patel. Mr. Patel is an extraordinary individual whose expertise in the field of sustainability commercialization has been highly influential.
 
I am a seasoned executive and entrepreneur with over 30 years of experience in operations, strategy, and finance, having worked across more than 35 countries. As a Founding Partner at Impact Synergy, I specialize in scaling social enterprises to maximize their positive impact. My journey includes co-founding Innovil, where I served as Chief Financial Officer and Strategist, leading global business strategy and finance operations to combat counterfeiting through innovative mobile-based solutions. Additionally, I am the Managing Director of Summit Angels, an early-stage investment group, and serve as a Senior Fellow at Columbia University's Columbia Business School, contributing to the advancement of social entrepreneurship.
 
I first became acquainted with Mr. Arjun Patel during the Global Innovation Prize competition, where I had the privilege to serve as a judge and mentor. The Global Innovation Prize is a prestigious global contest that encourages university students to formulate innovative social enterprises addressing critical global challenges, drawing over 200,000 participants from more than 120 countries. In this fiercely competitive environment, Mr. Patel and his startup, Elevate, achieved significant recognition by winning both the university and regional rounds, advancing to the final stage among the top contenders globally. This impressive journey is a testament to Mr. Patel's exceptional abilities and his unwavering commitment to devising impactful solutions for real-world problems. With Elevate, Mr. Patel pioneered a solution to address food waste and improve food security in India through a novel cold storage and distribution system. This system employed solar-powered refrigeration units specifically designed for rural areas with limited access to electricity, empowering local farmers with a dependable method to preserve and distribute their produce. Throughout the competition, I was particularly impressed by Mr. Patel's ability to effectively present and articulate the Elevate project, skillfully addressing questions and demonstrating a thorough understanding of its potential real-world impact. His innovative thinking, technical expertise, and leadership skills were pivotal in Elevate's success, highlighting his dedication to fostering significant global change.
 
Building on his achievements in the Global Innovation Prize competition, Mr. Arjun Patel distinguished himself at the Clinton Global Initiative University (CGI U) summit by winning the Resolution Social Venture Challenge (SVC), a platform that recognizes innovative social entrepreneurship. His startup, Elevate, was celebrated for its groundbreaking approach to addressing food waste and improving the financial outcomes for rural farmers in India. This award provided Mr. Patel with essential seed funding, mentorship, and access to a global network of resources, empowering him to further advance and scale his impactful agricultural technology venture, thus cementing his status as a pivotal force in sustainable development and social impact.
 
Mr. Arjun Patel is the driving force behind Novatech as its founder and commercial lead, showcasing his strong dedication to sustainability and innovative solutions. He leads the company in turning agricultural waste into valuable resources for energy and materials, working towards a waste-free, lower-emission future. Under his guidance, Novatech has successfully raised major funding, including closing a $700,000 pre-seed round, with more expected, attracting investors like the founder of Wired UK due to his ability to effectively convey the company's value. Mr. Patel has also secured agreements with major companies like Trust & Lever, highlighting his excellent skills in building strong business relationships. He’s been crucial in forming partnerships for research and development with big players around the world. His expertise shines through in the creation of a new plasma reactor that cuts emissions and costs significantly. Moreover, by setting up pilot sites in Chile and Panama, which could bring in $60 million annually, Mr. Patel demonstrates his vision and capability to expand Novatech’s impact globally.
 
Through his innovative work at Novatech, Mr. Patel has made substantial contributions to sustainability commercialization. By pioneering methods that efficiently convert agricultural waste into high-value feedstocks for energy and materials, he has introduced transformative processes that minimize environmental impact and promote the creation of a circular economy. His pioneering plasma reactor technology stands out for achieving significantly lower emissions and costs compared to traditional methods, making sustainable practices more accessible and appealing across various industries. Under his leadership, Novatech is setting new benchmarks in sustainable industrial practices, showcasing how technological advancements can drive both environmental and economic progress. Mr. Patel's vision and commitment to turning innovative concepts into practical, scalable solutions underscore his pivotal role in advancing the field of sustainability commercialization.
 
Mr. Patel's work at Novatech exemplifies his extraordinary abilities in sustainability commercialization. His technical expertise, strategic vision, and leadership skills have been instrumental in driving the company's success and advancing its mission to create a more sustainable future. His ability to secure funding, establish key partnerships, and develop groundbreaking technologies underscores his commitment to making a positive impact on the environment and society.
 
In conclusion, Mr. Patel's remarkable achievements in the Global Innovation Prize competition and his professional endeavors at Novatech clearly demonstrate his extraordinary abilities in sustainability commercialization. His innovative thinking, technical expertise, and leadership skills have been instrumental in developing and implementing solutions that address critical environmental challenges. Mr. Patel's dedication to making a positive impact on the world is truly commendable, and I have no doubt that he will continue to contribute significantly to the field of sustainability commercialization. I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Patel and am confident that he will be an invaluable asset in any endeavor he pursues.

Yours truly,




Jasper Nolan
Founding Partner  
Impact Synergy
[email contact here]
